ILLUSIONIST_POWER_MIRROR_IMAGE_POWER.des: The first card you play each turn adds a 0-cost [gold]Ethereal[/gold] [gold]Exhaust[/gold] copy to your hand for each stack. Taking unblocked damage removes all stacks.
ILLUSIONIST_POWER_MEMORY_POWER.title: Memory
ILLUSIONIST_POWER_MEMORY_POWER.descripti: Whenever one of your [gold]mirror images[/gold] is destroyed, draw 2 cards and gain 1 [img=32]res://illusionist/art/illusionist_energy_icon.webp[/img].
ILLUSIONIST_POWER_KALEIDOSCOPE_POWER.des: Every 5 cards you play, create a mirror image and deal 6 damage to all enemies.
ILLUSIONIST_POWER_PHASE_SHIFT_POWER.desc: The next time you take unblocked damage, your mirror images are not destroyed.
ILLUSIONIST_POWER_DAZZLE_POWER.title: Dazzle
ILLUSIONIST_POWER_DAZZLE_POWER.descripti: At the start of each turn, gain Block equal to your current number of mirror images.
ILLUSIONIST_POWER_CRESCENDO_POWER.title: Crescendo
ILLUSIONIST_POWER_CRESCENDO_POWER.descri: At the start of each turn, gain Strength equal to its stacks.
ILLUSIONIST_POWER_REKINDLE_POWER.title: Rekindle
ILLUSIONIST_POWER_REKINDLE_POWER.descrip: At the start of your next turn, [gold]Copy[/gold] a mirror image for each stack, then this expires.
ILLUSIONIST_POWER_ENCORE_POWER.title: Encore
ILLUSIONIST_POWER_ENCORE_POWER.descripti: At the end of your turn, return a random card with [gold]Retain[/gold] from your discard pile to your hand.
ILLUSIONIST_POWER_TRANSMUTE_POWER.title: Transmute
ILLUSIONIST_POWER_TRANSMUTE_POWER.descri: At the end of your turn, each transmuted card [gold]transforms[/gold] into the card it was before its latest [gold]transform[/gold].
ILLUSIONIST_POWER_FLUXWEAVE_POWER.title: Fluxweave
ILLUSIONIST_POWER_FLUXWEAVE_POWER.descri: For every 2 cards you transform, draw 1 card.
ILLUSIONIST_POWER_IMPROVISE_POWER.title: Improvise
ILLUSIONIST_POWER_IMPROVISE_POWER.descri: Each turn, the first cards you transmute are each played at a random enemy, one per stack.
Counts the cards you have transformed this turn.
ILLUSIONIST_POWER_MOMENTUM_POWER.title: Momentum
ILLUSIONIST_POWER_MOMENTUM_POWER.descrip: Counts toward drawing a card and gaining energy every 10 transforms. Counter shown on power icon.
ILLUSIONIST_POWER_EXTRACT_POWER.title: Extract
ILLUSIONIST_POWER_EXTRACT_POWER.descript: Gain 1 energy at the start of each turn.
